title: Endarru's Fiery Adventures
description: A modpack that improves minecraft's adventure, combat, and magic mechanics. This modpack also adds RPG elements.
body:
A low resourse modpack that aims to be the perfect blend of Exploration, Combat, and Rpg elements while being able to run on most devices.
- This modpack improves minecraft's adventure aspect by adding many structure and terain generation mods such as all of yung's mods, terralith, tectonic, and CTOV. To make the End and Nether generation better there is both Better Nether and Better End.
- This modpack also adds various combat related mods such as Better Combat. This adds a easy but intuitive combat system.
- There are many bosses and mob captains that give this modpack a added difficulty.
- The many performance mods such as Sodium, Indium, Lithium, and more allow this modpack to be run on most low end devices at high fps.
